arabicText: الٓر ۚ تِلْكَ ءَايَٰتُ ٱلْكِتَٰبِ وَقُرْءَانٍۢ مُّبِينٍۢ
translationText: Alif, Lam, Ra. These are the Verses of the Book; a Quran that makes things clear.

arabicText: رُّبَمَا يَوَدُّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لَوْ كَانُوا۟ مُسْلِمِينَ
translationText: Perhaps those who disbelieve would like to become Muslims.

arabicText: ذَرْهُمْ يَأْكُلُوا۟ وَيَتَمَتَّعُوا۟ وَيُلْهِهِمُ ٱلْأَمَلُ ۖ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ
translationText: Leave them to eat, and enjoy, and be lulled by hope. They will find out.

arabicText: وَمَآ أَهْلَكْنَا مِن قَرْيَةٍ إِلَّا وَلَهَا كِتَابٌۭ مَّعْلُومٌۭ
translationText: We have never destroyed a town unless it had a set time.

arabicText: مَّا تَسْبِقُ مِنْ أُمَّةٍ أَجَلَهَا وَمَا يَسْتَـْٔخِرُونَ
translationText: No nation can bring its time forward, nor can they delay it.

arabicText: وَقَالُوا۟ يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِى نُزِّلَ عَلَيْهِ ٱلذِّكْرُ إِنَّكَ لَمَجْنُونٌۭ
translationText: And they said, "O you who received the message, you are insane."

arabicText: لَّوْ مَا تَأْتِينَا بِٱلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةِ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰدِقِينَ
translationText: Why do you not bring us the angels, if you are truthful?"

arabicText: مَا نُنَزِّلُ ٱلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةَ إِلَّا بِٱلْحَقِّ وَمَا كَانُوٓا۟ إِذًۭا مُّنظَرِينَ
translationText: We do not send the angels down except with reason, and they will not be held back.

arabicText: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَزَّلْنَا ٱلذِّكْرَ وَإِنَّا لَهُۥ لَحَٰفِظُونَ
translationText: Surely We revealed the Message, and We will surely preserve it.

arabicText: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ فِى شِيَعِ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
translationText: We sent others before you, to the former communities.

arabicText: وَمَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
translationText: But no messenger came to them, but they ridiculed him.

arabicText: كَذَٰلِكَ نَسْلُكُهُۥ فِى قُلُوبِ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ
translationText: Thus We slip it into the hearts of the guilty.

arabicText: لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِهِۦ ۖ وَقَدْ خَلَتْ سُنَّةُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
translationText: They do not believe in it, though the ways of the ancients have passed away.

arabicText: وَلَوْ فَتَحْنَا عَلَيْهِم بَابًۭا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ فَظَلُّوا۟ فِيهِ يَعْرُجُونَ
translationText: Even if We opened for them a gateway into the sky, and they began to ascend through it.

arabicText: لَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّمَا سُكِّرَتْ أَبْصَٰرُنَا بَلْ نَحْنُ قَوْمٌۭ مَّسْحُورُونَ
translationText: They would still say, "Our eyes are hallucinating; in fact, we are people bewitched."

arabicText: وَلَقَدْ جَعَلْنَا فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ بُرُوجًۭا وَزَيَّنَّٰهَا لِلنَّٰظِرِينَ
translationText: We placed constellations in the sky, and made them beautiful to the beholders.

arabicText: وَحَفِظْنَٰهَا مِن كُلِّ شَيْطَٰنٍۢ رَّجِيمٍ
translationText: And We guarded them from every outcast devil.

arabicText: إِلَّا مَنِ ٱسْتَرَقَ ٱلسَّمْعَ فَأَتْبَعَهُۥ شِهَابٌۭ مُّبِينٌۭ
translationText: Except one who steals a hearing, and is followed by a visible projectile.

arabicText: وَٱلْأَرْضَ مَدَدْنَٰهَا وَأَلْقَيْنَا فِيهَا رَوَٰسِىَ وَأَنۢبَتْنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ مَّوْزُونٍۢ
translationText: We spread the earth, and placed stabilizers in it, and in it We grew all things in proper measure.

arabicText: وَجَعَلْنَا لَكُمْ فِيهَا مَعَٰيِشَ وَمَن لَّسْتُمْ لَهُۥ بِرَٰزِقِينَ
translationText: And in it We created livelihoods for you, and for those for whom you are not the providers.

arabicText: وَإِن مِّن شَىْءٍ إِلَّا عِندَنَا خَزَآئِنُهُۥ وَمَا نُنَزِّلُهُۥٓ إِلَّا بِقَدَرٍۢ مَّعْلُومٍۢ
translationText: There is not a thing but with Us are its stores, and We send it down only in precise measure.

arabicText: وَأَرْسَلْنَا ٱلرِّيَٰحَ لَوَٰقِحَ فَأَنزَلْنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءًۭ فَأَسْقَيْنَٰكُمُوهُ وَمَآ أَنتُمْ لَهُۥ بِخَٰزِنِينَ
translationText: We send the fertilizing winds; and send down water from the sky, and give it to you to drink, and you are not the ones who store it.

arabicText: وَإِنَّا لَنَحْنُ نُحْىِۦ وَنُمِيتُ وَنَحْنُ ٱلْوَٰرِثُونَ
translationText: It is We who give life and cause death, and We are the Inheritors.

arabicText: وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْنَا ٱلْمُسْتَقْدِمِينَ مِنكُمْ وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْنَا ٱلْمُسْتَـْٔخِرِينَ
translationText: And We know those of you who go forward, and We know those who lag behind.

arabicText: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ يَحْشُرُهُمْ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ حَكِيمٌ عَلِيمٌۭ
translationText: It is your Lord who will gather them together. He is the Wise, the Knowing.

arabicText: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَٰنَ مِن صَلْصَٰلٍۢ مِّنْ حَمَإٍۢ مَّسْنُونٍۢ
translationText: We created the human being from clay, from molded mud.

arabicText: وَٱلْجَآنَّ خَلَقْنَٰهُ مِن قَبْلُ مِن نَّارِ ٱلسَّمُومِ
translationText: And the jinn We created before, from piercing fire.

arabicText: وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةِ إِنِّى خَٰلِقٌۢ بَشَرًۭا مِّن صَلْصَٰلٍۢ مِّنْ حَمَإٍۢ مَّسْنُونٍۢ
translationText: Your Lord said to the angels, "I am creating a human being from clay, from molded mud."

arabicText: فَإِذَا سَوَّيْتُهُۥ وَنَفَخْتُ فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِى فَقَعُوا۟ لَهُۥ سَٰجِدِينَ
translationText: "When I have formed him, and breathed into him of My spirit, fall down prostrating before him."

arabicText: فَسَجَدَ ٱلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ كُلُّهُمْ أَجْمَعُونَ
translationText: So the angels prostrated themselves, all together.

arabicText: إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ أَبَىٰٓ أَن يَكُونَ مَعَ ٱلسَّٰجِدِينَ
translationText: Except for Satan. He refused to be among those who prostrated themselves.

arabicText: قَالَ يَٰٓإِبْلِيسُ مَا لَكَ أَلَّا تَكُونَ مَعَ ٱلسَّٰجِدِينَ
translationText: He said, "O Satan, what kept you from being among those who prostrated themselves?"

arabicText: قَالَ لَمْ أَكُن لِّأَسْجُدَ لِبَشَرٍ خَلَقْتَهُۥ مِن صَلْصَٰلٍۢ مِّنْ حَمَإٍۢ مَّسْنُونٍۢ
translationText: He said, "I am not about to prostrate myself before a human being, whom You created from clay, from molded mud."

arabicText: قَالَ فَٱخْرُجْ مِنْهَا فَإِنَّكَ رَجِيمٌۭ
translationText: He said, "Then get out of here, for you are an outcast".

arabicText: وَإِنَّ عَلَيْكَ ٱللَّعْنَةَ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلدِّينِ
translationText: "And the curse will be upon you until the Day of Judgment."

arabicText: قَالَ رَبِّ فَأَنظِرْنِىٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ
translationText: He said, "My Lord, reprieve me until the Day they are resurrected."

arabicText: قَالَ فَإِنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلْمُنظَرِينَ
translationText: He said, "You are of those reprieved."

arabicText: إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلْوَقْتِ ٱلْمَعْلُومِ
translationText: "Until the Day of the time appointed."

arabicText: قَالَ رَبِّ بِمَآ أَغْوَيْتَنِى لَأُزَيِّنَنَّ لَهُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَأُغْوِيَنَّهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
translationText: He said, "My Lord, since You have lured me away, I will glamorize for them on earth, and I will lure them all away."

arabicText: إِلَّا عِبَادَكَ مِنْهُمُ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ
translationText: "Except for Your sincere servants among them."

arabicText: قَالَ هَٰذَا صِرَٰطٌ عَلَىَّ مُسْتَقِيمٌ
translationText: He said, "This is a right way with Me."

arabicText: إِنَّ عِبَادِى لَيْسَ لَكَ عَلَيْهِمْ سُلْطَٰنٌ إِلَّا مَنِ ٱتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ ٱلْغَاوِينَ
translationText: "Over My servants you have no authority, except for the sinners who follow you."

arabicText: وَإِنَّ جَهَنَّمَ لَمَوْعِدُهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
translationText: And Hell is the meeting-place for them all.

arabicText: لَهَا سَبْعَةُ أَبْوَٰبٍۢ لِّكُلِّ بَابٍۢ مِّنْهُمْ جُزْءٌۭ مَّقْسُومٌ
translationText: "It has seven doors; for each door is an assigned class."

arabicText: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّٰتٍۢ وَعُيُونٍ
translationText: But the righteous will be in gardens with springs.

arabicText: ٱدْخُلُوهَا بِسَلَٰمٍ ءَامِنِينَ
translationText: "Enter it in peace and security."

arabicText: وَنَزَعْنَا مَا فِى صُدُورِهِم مِّنْ غِلٍّ إِخْوَٰنًا عَلَىٰ سُرُرٍۢ مُّتَقَٰبِلِينَ
translationText: And We will remove all ill-feelings from their hearts-brothers and sisters, on couches facing one another.

arabicText: لَا يَمَسُّهُمْ فِيهَا نَصَبٌۭ وَمَا هُم مِّنْهَا بِمُخْرَجِينَ
translationText: No fatigue will ever touch them therein, nor will they be asked to leave it.

arabicText: ۞ نَبِّئْ عِبَادِىٓ أَنِّىٓ أَنَا ٱلْغَفُورُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
translationText: Inform My servants that I am the Forgiver, the Merciful.

arabicText: وَأَنَّ عَذَابِى هُوَ ٱلْعَذَابُ ٱلْأَلِيمُ
translationText: And that My punishment is the painful punishment.

arabicText: وَنَبِّئْهُمْ عَن ضَيْفِ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ
translationText: And inform them of the guests of Abraham.

arabicText: إِذْ دَخَلُوا۟ عَلَيْهِ فَقَالُوا۟ سَلَٰمًۭا قَالَ إِنَّا مِنكُمْ وَجِلُونَ
translationText: When they entered upon him, and said, "Peace." He said, "We are wary of you."

arabicText: قَالُوا۟ لَا تَوْجَلْ إِنَّا نُبَشِّرُكَ بِغُلَٰمٍ عَلِيمٍۢ
translationText: They said, "Do not fear; we bring you good news of a boy endowed with knowledge."

arabicText: قَالَ أَبَشَّرْتُمُونِى عَلَىٰٓ أَن مَّسَّنِىَ ٱلْكِبَرُ فَبِمَ تُبَشِّرُونَ
translationText: He said, "Do you bring me good news, when old age has overtaken me? What good news do you bring?"

arabicText: قَالُوا۟ بَشَّرْنَٰكَ بِٱلْحَقِّ فَلَا تَكُن مِّنَ ٱلْقَٰنِطِينَ
translationText: They said, "We bring you good news in truth, so do not despair."

arabicText: قَالَ وَمَن يَقْنَطُ مِن رَّحْمَةِ رَبِّهِۦٓ إِلَّا ٱلضَّآلُّونَ
translationText: He said, "And who despairs of his Lord's mercy but the lost?"

arabicText: قَالَ فَمَا خَطْبُكُمْ أَيُّهَا ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
translationText: He said, "So what is your business, O envoys?"

arabicText: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّآ أُرْسِلْنَآ إِلَىٰ قَوْمٍۢ مُّجْرِمِينَ
translationText: They said, "We were sent to a sinful people."

arabicText: إِلَّآ ءَالَ لُوطٍ إِنَّا لَمُنَجُّوهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
translationText: "Except for the family of Lot; we will save them all."

arabicText: إِلَّا ٱمْرَأَتَهُۥ قَدَّرْنَآ ۙ إِنَّهَا لَمِنَ ٱلْغَٰبِرِينَ
translationText: "Except for his wife." We have determined that she will be of those who lag behind.

arabicText: فَلَمَّا جَآءَ ءَالَ لُوطٍ ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
translationText: And when the envoys came to the family of Lot.

arabicText: قَالَ إِنَّكُمْ قَوْمٌۭ مُّنكَرُونَ
translationText: He said, "You are a people unknown to me."

arabicText: قَالُوا۟ بَلْ جِئْنَٰكَ بِمَا كَانُوا۟ فِيهِ يَمْتَرُونَ
translationText: They said, "We bring you what they have doubts about."

arabicText: وَأَتَيْنَٰكَ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَإِنَّا لَصَٰدِقُونَ
translationText: "We bring you the truth, and we are truthful."

arabicText: فَأَسْرِ بِأَهْلِكَ بِقِطْعٍۢ مِّنَ ٱلَّيْلِ وَٱتَّبِعْ أَدْبَٰرَهُمْ وَلَا يَلْتَفِتْ مِنكُمْ أَحَدٌۭ وَٱمْضُوا۟ حَيْثُ تُؤْمَرُونَ
translationText: "Travel with your family at the dead of the night, and follow up behind them, and let none of you look back, and proceed as commanded."

arabicText: وَقَضَيْنَآ إِلَيْهِ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْأَمْرَ أَنَّ دَابِرَ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ مَقْطُوعٌۭ مُّصْبِحِينَ
translationText: And We informed him of Our decree: the last remnant of these will be uprooted by early morning.

arabicText: وَجَآءَ أَهْلُ ٱلْمَدِينَةِ يَسْتَبْشِرُونَ
translationText: And the people of the town came joyfully.

arabicText: قَالَ إِنَّ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ ضَيْفِى فَلَا تَفْضَحُونِ
translationText: He said, "These are my guests, so do not embarrass me."

arabicText: وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَلَا تُخْزُونِ
translationText: "And fear God, and do not disgrace me."

arabicText: قَالُوٓا۟ أَوَلَمْ نَنْهَكَ عَنِ ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ
translationText: They said, "Did we not forbid you from strangers?"

arabicText: قَالَ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ بَنَاتِىٓ إِن كُنتُمْ فَٰعِلِينَ
translationText: He said, "These are my daughters, if you must."

arabicText: لَعَمْرُكَ إِنَّهُمْ لَفِى سَكْرَتِهِمْ يَعْمَهُونَ
translationText: By your life, they were blundering in their drunkenness.

arabicText: فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ ٱلصَّيْحَةُ مُشْرِقِينَ
translationText: So the Blast struck them at sunrise.

arabicText: فَجَعَلْنَا عَٰلِيَهَا سَافِلَهَا وَأَمْطَرْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ حِجَارَةًۭ مِّن سِجِّيلٍ
translationText: And We turned it upside down, and rained down upon them stones of baked clay.

arabicText: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَءَايَٰتٍۢ لِّلْمُتَوَسِّمِينَ
translationText: Surely in that are lessons for those who read signs.

arabicText: وَإِنَّهَا لَبِسَبِيلٍۢ مُّقِيمٍ
translationText: And it is on an existing road.

arabicText: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَءَايَةًۭ لِّلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
translationText: Surely in that is a sign for the believers.

arabicText: وَإِن كَانَ أَصْحَٰبُ ٱلْأَيْكَةِ لَظَٰلِمِينَ
translationText: The people of the Woods were also wrongdoers.

arabicText: فَٱنتَقَمْنَا مِنْهُمْ وَإِنَّهُمَا لَبِإِمَامٍۢ مُّبِينٍۢ
translationText: So We took revenge upon them. Both are clearly documented.

arabicText: وَلَقَدْ كَذَّبَ أَصْحَٰبُ ٱلْحِجْرِ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
translationText: The people of the Rock also rejected the messengers.

arabicText: وَءَاتَيْنَٰهُمْ ءَايَٰتِنَا فَكَانُوا۟ عَنْهَا مُعْرِضِينَ
translationText: We gave them Our revelations, but they turned away from them.

arabicText: وَكَانُوا۟ يَنْحِتُونَ مِنَ ٱلْجِبَالِ بُيُوتًا ءَامِنِينَ
translationText: They used to carve homes in the mountains, feeling secure.

arabicText: فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ ٱلصَّيْحَةُ مُصْبِحِينَ
translationText: But the Blast struck them in the morning.

arabicText: فَمَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
translationText: All they had acquired was of no avail to them.

arabicText: وَمَا خَلَقْنَا ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ إِلَّا بِٱلْحَقِّ ۗ وَإِنَّ ٱلسَّاعَةَ لَءَاتِيَةٌۭ ۖ فَٱصْفَحِ ٱلصَّفْحَ ٱلْجَمِيلَ
translationText: We did not create the heavens and the earth, and what lies between them, except with truth. The Hour is coming, so forgive with gracious forgiveness.

arabicText: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ ٱلْخَلَّٰقُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
translationText: Your Lord is the All-Knowing Creator.

arabicText: وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَٰكَ سَبْعًۭا مِّنَ ٱلْمَثَانِى وَٱلْقُرْءَانَ ٱلْعَظِيمَ
translationText: We have given you seven of the pairs, and the Grand Quran.

arabicText: لَا تَمُدَّنَّ عَيْنَيْكَ إِلَىٰ مَا مَتَّعْنَا بِهِۦٓ أَزْوَٰجًۭا مِّنْهُمْ وَلَا تَحْزَنْ عَلَيْهِمْ وَٱخْفِضْ جَنَاحَكَ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
translationText: Do not extend your eyes towards what We have bestowed on some couples of them to enjoy, and do not grieve over them, and lower your wing to the believers.

arabicText: وَقُلْ إِنِّىٓ أَنَا ٱلنَّذِيرُ ٱلْمُبِينُ
translationText: And say, "I am the clear warner."

arabicText: كَمَآ أَنزَلْنَا عَلَى ٱلْمُقْتَسِمِينَ
translationText: Just as We sent down to the separatists.

arabicText: ٱلَّذِينَ جَعَلُوا۟ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ عِضِينَ
translationText: Those who made the Quran obsolete.

arabicText: فَوَرَبِّكَ لَنَسْـَٔلَنَّهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
translationText: By your Lord, we will question them all.

arabicText: عَمَّا كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ
translationText: About what they used to do.

arabicText: فَٱصْدَعْ بِمَا تُؤْمَرُ وَأَعْرِضْ عَنِ ٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ
translationText: So proclaim openly what you are commanded, and turn away from the polytheists.

arabicText: إِنَّا كَفَيْنَٰكَ ٱلْمُسْتَهْزِءِينَ
translationText: We are enough for you against the mockers.

arabicText: ٱلَّذِينَ يَجْعَلُونَ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا ءَاخَرَ ۚ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ
translationText: Those who set up another god with God. They will come to know.

arabicText: وَلَقَدْ نَعْلَمُ أَنَّكَ يَضِيقُ صَدْرُكَ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ
translationText: We are aware that your heart is strained by what they say.

arabicText: فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَكُن مِّنَ ٱلسَّٰجِدِينَ
translationText: So glorify the praise of your Lord, and be among those who bow down.

arabicText: وَٱعْبُدْ رَبَّكَ حَتَّىٰ يَأْتِيَكَ ٱلْيَقِينُ
translationText: And worship your Lord in order to attain certainty.
